title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Mamaearth

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Mamaearth
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mamaearth! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mamaearth:
Mamaearth is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth!
